name: sobrecito
description: Sobre — nomina confidencial sobre Stellar/Soroban con ZK. Monorepo poliglota (web + ZK/Rust + ops).

scripts.zk:test: cd packages/zk && cargo test -p soroban-utils -p pool
scripts.pool:build: cd packages/zk && cargo build -p pool --target wasm32v1-none
scripts.contracts:build: cd packages/zk && stellar contract build --manifest-path Cargo.toml --out-dir target/stellar --optimize
